title: Patchy 128x PBR
description: Minecraft with enhanced detail including emmisive PBR textures in a subtle patchwork quilt style.
body:
Patchy 128x is an upscaled texture pack that enhances the Minecraft experience while preserving its classic feel. Each pixel in the standard texture pack is assigned an 8x8 tile, creating a unique patchwork quilt style design.

V10 update - First Modrinth release!
This is a rather large update. Biggest of note.
- Fixed metallic blocks for Kappa
- Fixed some depth issues on a few shaders
- Improved POM edge detailing
- General Specular improvements
- Updated about 35 blocks.

Key Features

POM 3D Mapping: All blocks feature hand crafted 3D effects on the main surfaces for true depth.
Specular Mapping: Different materials have realistic reflection levels to mimic real-world surfaces.
IRIS Compatible Emissives: Includes plenty of glowing blocks for a dynamic environment.
Shader Compatibility: Optimized to work with all top-tier shaders.
3D Animated Ores: Custom extruded ores featuring a unique animated glimmer effect.
HQX Items: 2x Scaled items for smoother looking items.

Euphoria settings from screenshots and how I play:
Profile: Popular
RP Support: LabPBR
Materials\Integrated\Glowing Ores\Glowing Ores: Off
Materials\Integrated\Other IPR\IPBR Emissive mode: LabPBR > IPBR+
Materials\labPBR\POM Depth: 0.40
Materials\labPBR\POM on Cutout Surfaces: On
